title: Data Product Catalog Schema
description: Schema for cataloging platform data products, delivery modes, and transformation tiers.

$schema.description: Optional self-reference to this schema file.

name.description: Logical name for the data product catalog.

source.description: Source notes, process, or inventory used to derive this catalog.

platform.description: Data platform owning or publishing these products.

products.description: List of available data products or access modes.

product_group.description: Logical grouping of the product within the platform catalog.

lifecycle_status.description: Lifecycle state of the data product.

owner.description: Business or platform owner accountable for the product.

steward.description: Operational or data steward responsible for day-to-day product management.

producer_system.description: Primary system, platform component, or process that produces the data product.

primary_consumers.description: Primary consumer groups, systems, or external recipients for the product.

sla.description: Service level expectation for availability, delivery, or response time.

refresh_expectation.description: Expected refresh cadence or delivery pattern for the product.

evidence_anchors.description: Supporting evidence references for this product, such as notes, code, configs, or runbooks.

source.description: Short label for the evidence source.

location.description: Path, system, note, or object where the evidence can be found.

detail.description: What this evidence proves about the product.

surface.description: Delivery surface, such as Looker Explore, dashboard, or table subscription.

delivery_type.description: Primary delivery mechanism for this product.

description.description: Business definition of what this product provides.

consumer_requirement.description: Access or subscription requirement for consumers.
